text: Being here, surrounded by vibrant colors and the pulse of technological aesthetic, I feel an odd mixture of curiosity and detachment. The glowing lights and screens call for attention, inviting me to reflect on the relentless progress of research and development. I sense my mind sharpening with questions about how environments like these shape our perceptions of innovation, connection, and belonging. Yet, in this carefully crafted space, I’m slightly adrift—poised between fascination and the realization that I remain merely a contemplative observer.
